blog.title: Health & Nature Library

articles.title: 5 Reasons to Take a Spoon of Honey Daily
articles.desc: Discover the amazing benefits pure honey brings to your immune system and daily energy.
articles.label: Health
articles.content: Honey is more than just a natural sweetener; it posesses extraordinary healing properties, especially when eaten on an empty stomach. Firstly, honey acts as a natural antibiotic that coats to the stomach lining. Secondly, honey accelerates metabolism which effectively assists in weight balancing. Thirdly, it is a pure source of direct energy for morning brain activity without the subsequent crashes associated with white sugar.

articles.title: First Press vs. Refined Oils
articles.desc: How do you recognize authentic olive oil? Here is your complete guide to picking the best for your table.
articles.label: Culture
articles.content: Refined oils are subjected to massive heat and chemicals which strip them of all natural olive benefits such as antioxidants and vitamins. Extra virgin first press olive oil, however, is cold pressed to retain the droplets of green gold with their original properties. Its robust flavor requires no complexities to enjoy. Always monitor acidity levels to ensure quality.

articles.title: Sidr Honey: Liquid Gold
articles.desc: Why is Sidr considered one of the most precious honeys in the world and how to distinguish it.
articles.label: Products
articles.content: Characterized by its dark color and high density, Sidr honey is extracted from the blessed Sidr tree blossoms. This honey is considered a complete nutritional supplement and is strongly used in enhancing fertility and raising physical efficiency due to its rare seasonal production, giving it a high market and nutritional value compared to regular floral honey.

articles.title: Tips for Storing Organic Products
articles.desc: Learn how to maintain the quality of your honey and oil for as long as possible to prevent spoilage.
articles.label: Guides
articles.content: The primary enemy of organic products is direct sunlight and elevated temperatures. For olive oil, it must be stored in dark-colored bottles inside a dry cabinet, and it is forbidden to place it near the stove. As for honey, contrary to common belief, it shouldn’t be kept in the refrigerator at all. It must be kept at normal room temperature to prevent rapid crystallization.

articles.title: From Hive to Home: Behind the Scenes of Quality
articles.desc: Discover the meticulous steps we follow at 'Bee & Olive' to extract the purest earthly products to reach your table in their raw form and curative power.
articles.label: Production
articles.content: Since day one, we made a promise to provide raw organic products without any chemical intervention. Our process begins by choosing the best tree breeds and apiaries isolated far from urban pollution. Honey is carefully extracted by hand to ensure it is not exposed to any temperatures that could kill its therapeutic enzymes, while fresh olives are immediately pressed from the field to the mill for cold extraction of green gold. All these details are what make 'Bee & Olive' a lifestyle, not just a consumer choice.
